title: postapimonitorsvalidateandcreatemonitor
description: Test creating a new monitor with valid data including plan-compliant URL, interval, threshold, and optional Pro-only fields. Verify response 201 with created monitor object.

title: postapimonitorsvalidateandrejectinvaliddata
description: Test creating a new monitor with invalid data such as malformed URL or out-of-range threshold. Verify response 400 with appropriate error message.

title: postapimonitorsrejectprofieldsforfreeplan
description: Test creating a new monitor on a Free plan with Pro-only fields like cssSelector or exclusionRules. Verify response 403 with error message.

title: patchapimonitorsidupdatefieldswithvalidation
description: Test updating an existing monitor's fields including name, URL, interval, active state, threshold, and Pro-only fields. Validate plan and threshold range. Verify response 200 with updated monitor or appropriate error codes.

title: patchapimonitorsidnotfound
description: Test updating a monitor that does not exist or is not owned by the user. Verify response 404 with 'Monitor not found' error.

title: deleteapimonitorsiddeletesmonitorandrelateddata
description: Test deleting an existing owned monitor. Verify response 200 with success true and cascading removal of snapshots, diffs, and alerts.

title: postapimonitorsidcheckmanualcheckproonly
description: Test triggering an immediate manual check on a Pro plan monitor. Verify response 200 with success true and updated manualChecksUsedThisPeriod.

title: postapimonitorsidcheckmanualcheckforfreeplan
description: Test triggering an immediate manual check on a Free plan monitor. Verify response 403 with error message.

title: getapimonitorsiddiffslistdiffshistory
description: Test retrieving the diff history for a specific monitor. Verify response 200 with list of diffs or 404 if monitor not found.

title: getapimonitorsiddiffsdiffidgetfulldiffdetail
description: Test retrieving full diff detail including snapshot metadata and diff data for a specific diff of a monitor. Verify response 200 with diff and monitor objects or 404 if diff not found.
